title: Hissal
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Hissal |homeworld=[[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]]''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Brigian]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Red]] |skin=Purple |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[University of Rudrig/Legends|University of Rudrig]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The university has concluded an Agreement of Aid for a fledgling college on Brigia. I am Hissal, and Brigia is my homeworld. The university has promised us guidance, materials and teaching aids.|Hissal|}} '''Hissal''' was a [[Brigian]] academic who, during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], served on the [[Committee for Interinstitutional Assistance]] of the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony's]] [[University of Rudrig/Legends|University of Rudrig]]. In [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], Hissal became involved in an effort to open a branch of the [[University/Legends|university]] on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Brigia]], which caused the authoritarian [[New Regime]] that governed Brigia to name Hissal a traitor and a fugitive. Hissal was forced to hire [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to deliver vital supplies to the new college—the clash with the New Regime that followed led to the destabilization of the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] government. ==Biography== {{Quote|The shipment is completely legal, but there is opposition from the planetary government. Though they can't contravene Imperial trade agreements, of course, we still fear there might be trouble in making delivery and—"
"You want someone who can look out for your stuff.|Hissal and Han Solo|}} A [[Brigian]] native of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]] in the backwater [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]], Hissal was an academic who by the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] had become affiliated with the [[University of Rudrig/Legends|University of Rudrig's]] [[Committee for Interinstitutional Assistance]]. By [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], Hissal had become involved in an effort to open a branch of the [[University/Legends|university]] on Brigia, although the initiative was met with considerable opposition from the Brigian [[New Regime]], which considered Hissal a fugitive from the state. As such, Hissal was forced to find alternative means to ship materials and teaching aids to the new college, fearing that the authorities would confiscate them upon delivery. Hissal learned of a capable [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] in the region named [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] who was working as pit crew for a small-time [[Grigmin|stunt pilot]] on the backwater world of [[Saheelindeel]]. Hissal traveled to Saheelindeel and came to a deal with the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]], hiring Solo and his [[First Mate/Legends|first mate]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] to transport a shipment of educational materials, including an extremely valuable [[duplicator]], to Brigia in exchange for two thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Solo and Chewbacca had nearly completed offloading the cargo with Hissal on Brigia when they were accosted by Brigian [[Internal Security Police]], who surrounded Solo's ''[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]'' as Hissal and the smugglers took refuge. Hissal stood and watched nervously as Solo negotiated with [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Keek (Brigia)|Keek]]—the Brigian sprung into action when Solo and Keek's confrontation came to [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], attacking the security chief from behind during the firefight. Although Keek was much physically stronger than Hissal and shrugged off his efforts, his interference allowed Solo to blast Keek over the head with a [[List of phrases and slang/Legends#S|scroll-gun]], knocking him out cold. After expelling Keek from the ''Falcon'', Solo allowed Hissal to use the ship's communication systems to broadcast information undermining the New Regime, ultimately destabilizing the planet's government. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Is it your plan to treat with these hoodlums? Legally spaking, they haven't got a receptacle to skloob in, I assure you.|Hissal, to Han Solo|}} A committed academic, Hissal was a tall, reedy [[Color/Legends|purple]]-skinned Brigian who was devoted to his mission to bring higher education to his homeworld. Although uncomfortable with the prospect of resorting to illegal means to achieve that goal, Hissal was extremely opposed to the Brigian "New Regime," regarding them nothing more than common "hoodlums," and welcomed Solo's aid. Although not a fighter, Hissal went as far as to back up Solo with force in his fight with Keek, taking a few blows in order to help the Corellian win the battle. ==Behind the scenes== Hissal made his sole appearance in the ''[[Star Wars Legends]]'' continuity in ''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'', a novel written by [[Brian Daley]] and released in [[1980]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *{{CSWECite|II|44|Hissal}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Hissal }} [[Category:Brigians]] [[Category:Educators]] [[Category:Males]]
